# getRef()

**Instance Method**

Returns an IOBluetoothSDPDataElementRef representation of the target IOBluetoothSDPDataElement object.

## Declaration

```swift
func getRef() -> Unmanaged<IOBluetoothSDPDataElementRef>!
```

## Return Value

Returns an IOBluetoothSDPDataElementRef representation of the target IOBluetoothSDPDataElement object.
